driftWarnings.requiredResolution: Live SQL snapshot for slug, status, category, district, and publication fields.
Live SQL location check before menu attribution or denominator-by-district adjustment.
Live duplicate audit; do not auto-delete or count either row as canonical F&B.

liveDatabaseCandidates.blocker: Requires a live SQL export to prove the DB-only row exists and is active.
